text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
MBSF Cost and Use Segment Codebook │ March 2026 │ V 1.3 14 

ASC_PRMRY_PMT 

LABEL: Ambulatory Surgery Center Primary Payer Amount 

DESCRIPTION: This variable indicates the total amount paid for services in the ambulatory surgery center (ASC) setting 
by a primary payer other than Medicare for a given year. ASC claims are a subset of the claim lines in the 
Part B carrier data file. 

The ASC claim lines are identified by the claim
